title: Tyrannosaurus rex vs. Triceratops
alt: Scientifically accurate paleoart of a Tyrannosaurus rex seizing a Triceratops in a muddy river delta at golden hour — two Late Cretaceous animals locked in combat, framed like a wildlife photograph.
description: A Tyrannosaurus rex lunges at a Triceratops in the shallows of a Late Cretaceous river delta, dust and water flying in low golden light. Two animals of the Hell Creek world, framed like a wildlife photograph — close, tense, and in motion. Detailed, realistic paleoart with accurate proportions, printed sharp enough to hang up close.
caption: A Tyrannosaurus rex clashes with a Triceratops in the muddy shallows of a Late Cretaceous river delta, framed close like a wildlife photo.
